enrichment.summary: Kyle tells the story of his 2007 marriage to a Chilean woman named Wu, who became pregnant shortly after they moved to the US. After pressure from Kyle to abort, she refused, then revealed the child was likely fathered by a prior boyfriend. She eventually returned to Chile and later moved to Italy to raise the daughter with the biological father. Kyle frames this as a lucky outcome and holds no grudge against her.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Personally regrets pressuring his wife and now believes it was wrong for him, though thinks it should remain legal
Views it as a favor—she did him a solid by sparing him from raising a child that may not have been his
Would not pursue it; prefers younger, physically fit women
Indifferent to having more kids; considers his website his legacy

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle keeps getting video requests and hasn't even been out of bed yet because he keeps doing them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle moved to Chile with his wife Wu and her son in May 2007.

claims.subject: Wu
claims.claim: Wu is Chilean.

claims.subject: Wu's son
claims.claim: Wu's son was 14 when they moved to Chile in 2007.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle was in Chile for five years with Wu.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle got married in Chile and then returned to the US with Wu because she wanted to live there with him.

claims.subject: Wu
claims.claim: Wu got pregnant a month after arriving in the US.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle was terrified of having kids and wasn't making any money at the time.

claims.subject: Wu
claims.claim: Wu was 37 years old and wanted to have another kid.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle was working as a window washer for someone else and freaked out about the pregnancy.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle initially tried to get Wu to have an abortion because he didn't want the baby.

claims.subject: Wu
claims.claim: Wu is Catholic and didn't want to have an abortion.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle now thinks abortions should be illegal, but believes they should be legal for others.

claims.subject: Wu
claims.claim: Wu agreed to have an abortion for a week but then changed her mind.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle changed his mind and decided they should have the baby, then changed his mind again and said they should divorce.

claims.subject: Wu
claims.claim: Wu told Kyle the baby wasn't his but was from a boyfriend she had before meeting him.

claims.subject: Wu
claims.claim: Wu admitted she was dating and having sex with her ex-boyfriend while still in Chile before leaving.

claims.subject: Wu
claims.claim: Wu went to Mexico for a weekend, claiming a friend paid for it, but later admitted it was her boyfriend who paid so they could plan her leaving Kyle.

claims.subject: Wu
claims.claim: Wu dumped Kyle, went back to Chile, had the kid there, and then moved to Italy with her boyfriend.

claims.subject: Wu's daughter
claims.claim: Wu's daughter turned 13 on September 26th.

claims.subject: Wu's boyfriend
claims.claim: Wu's boyfriend is raising their daughter as the biological father.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes Wu did him a favor by leaving him and raising the kid with someone else.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks it would have been terrible if he had raised a kid that wasn't his and he didn't want.

claims.subject: Wu
claims.claim: Kyle considers Wu his best friend and says she has his back more than anyone.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is loyal to Wu and loves her but wouldn't marry her again due to her age and physical appearance.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle prefers women under 30 who are super physically fit with tight skin.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle views his website as his kid and doesn't feel the need to have children.
